title: Pesuren Pesuren Lyrics Pannaiyarum Padminiyum Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Pesuren pesuren
Singer(s): Justin Prabhakaran, Vairam, Pandiyamma, Thayamma
Movie: Pannaiyarum Padminiyum
Music: Justin Prabhakaran

Pesuren pesuren kadhal mozhi
pesaama pesuren kangal vazhi
yaarindha gramathu devadha
naanenna solluven novudhu
eudthupoga thudikkudhu manam
enakku enakkunu

Podaa podaa thookkikittu
unna yaaru inga ketkuradhu.
saami unna melirundhu
oru saatchi pola paakuradhu.

Pesuren pesuren kadhal mozhi
pesaama pesuren kangal vazhi

Kadhir adichcha kalamaanen
kall erinja kulamaanen
kanne un kan pattathaal.

enakku yedho aayaachu
edhakandaalum neeyaachu
kadhalthaan vel vittathaa?

Thaavaniyaa maaridanum
thozhumela aeridanum
idayum sadayum nadayum
kodi perum
en idhayam nizhayaai pinnaal
odi varum

Pesuren pesuren kadhal mozhi
pesaama pesuren kangal vazhi

Kurukka nedukka nadapottu
kulunga kulunga isai paatu
paadaadho un kolusu

Madam pidicha thaer pola
varapadanja neer pola
aadaadho en manasu

Panjaangaththa paakkureney
iyer kitta ketkureney
myile unna naan manakkum
thaedhiyathaan
naan mudhalnaal iravil solven
meedhiyathaan

Pesuren pesuren kadhal mozhi
pesaama pesuren kangal vazhi
yaarindha gramathu devadha
naanenna solluven novudhu
eudthupoga thudikkudhu manam
enakku enakkunu

Podaa podaa thookkikittu
unna yaaru inga ketkuradhu.
saami unna melirundhu
oru saatchi pola paakuradhu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Pesuren Pesuren'?

The song conveys feelings of love and longing, expressing emotions without directly speaking them.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Pannaiyarum Padminiyum, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings towards love and connection with others.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung and composed by Justin Prabhakaran.

When was 'Pesuren Pesuren' released?

The song was released on February 8, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pesuren Pesuren, the protagonist expresses deep emotions of love and longing, encapsulating the essence of romance in a melodic form. The soothing voice of Justin Prabhakaran enhances the heartfelt lyrics, making it a memorable piece in the film Pannaiyarum Padminiyum. This song evokes nostalgia and warmth, resonating with anyone who has experienced the nuances of love. It serves as a beautiful reminder of the unspoken words that often linger in relationships.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pesuren Pesuren from the movie Pannaiyarum Padminiyum beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Justin Prabhakaran's soulful voice, this track resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. The unique blend of heartfelt lyrics and soothing melodies makes it a must-listen for fans of Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: I speak, I speak without saying the words of love. I will say who is the god of this village, as my eyes lead me.
Hey, hey, who is asking about you here? Like a witness looking down on you from above.
I speak, I speak without saying the words of love. I will say who is the god of this village.
When the sun rises, I become a fool. When the eyes close, I become a fool because of your gaze.
Something has happened to me, no matter what, you are there. Is it love that has taken over?
Even if the world changes, and the paths and ways change, my heart will run straight to you.
I speak, I speak without saying the words of love. I will say who is the god of this village.
With a twist, the music plays, and your anklet jingles.
Like water that flows when a pot is lifted, my heart dances.
I look at the calendar and ask the priest. I will tell you from the first night that I will love you.
I speak, I speak without saying the words of love. I will say who is the god of this village, as my eyes lead me.
Hey, hey, who is asking about you here? Like a witness looking down on you from above.
